title: The Silver Lining
writer: Donald I. Buchanan, Charles Henry Smith, Roland West
actors: Jewel Carmen, Leslie Austin, Coit Albertson
plot: At a reception for Mr. and Mrs. Vance Leighton, three men are discussing the effects of heredity in shaping the careers of children. To prove his contention that the theory of heredity is often demonstrated to be false, John Stron...
